title: αS PFF Uptake Protocol
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"evpod","text":"This protocol details the uptake of αS PFF treatement.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Exchange fresh culture media to cells.
Prepare αS PFF working solution. Frozen stock is 5 μg/ml , dilute to 0.25 μg/ml in sterile PBS followed by sonication (1 Sec ON/ 1 Sec OFF) for 00:02:00 with 20% amplitude.
Add αS PFF to cells for a final concentration of 4 μg/ml .
Incubate for desired duration prior to lysate collection.
creator: Jane Balster
